subcodes.first_line: To begin, let it be understood that the Prophets or Messengers of God are holy souls sent by Him to lead us to a knowledge of God and establish laws
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @Adam; Adam and Eve, @symbolism, @imagery in the Qur'an, @material and spiritual existence; two books
